title: The Golden Bell Becomes the Goal
description: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Luffy, Aisa, Eneru. Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The only one remaining... is you.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: To your dream world with you.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: That is how it should be.

summary: Enel’s ark becomes an active threat, turning the conflict from a survival game into a race to save Skypiea.
